svg.title: MPM 2.0 RabbitMQ architecture — Purdue ISA-95
svg.desc: RabbitMQ-based MPM 2.0 architecture for Volvo Cars Torslanda. Castle simulator and MES portal at Level 3 publish via RabbitMQ to the Ignition Bridge, which exposes 160 tags over HTTP. Ignition Gateway polls and writes tags every 3 seconds to drive three Perspective dashboards at Level 2.
svg.text: Volvo Cars Torslanda (VCT) · Python 3.11 | RabbitMQ 3.x | Ignition 8.3.4 | Flask 3.1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Castle Simulator v3 publish schedule and event types')
sendPrompt('What are the 5 pages of the Castle MES Portal and what does each do?')
sendPrompt('How does RabbitMQ route the 8 queues using topic exchange in MPM 2.0?')
sendPrompt('How does the Ignition Bridge process RabbitMQ events into 160 Ignition tags?')

svg.text: Level 2 — supervisory control (SCADA / HMI) · project: MPM2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Ignition Gateway MQ_Tag_Updater timer script work in detail?')
g.text: writeBlocking(160 tags) → [default]MPM2/ · 43 orig + 36 PF + 42 FTT + 39 DPV

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tags and data does PlantOverview dashboard bind to?')
sendPrompt('What does MPM Classic display and how does it replace MPM 1.0?')
sendPrompt('What does MPM Modern display and how is it different from MPM Classic?')

g.text: Real Castle MES connects here in production · out of scope for this POC

svg.text: Real Castle MES schemas — sample data (VCT Torslanda 2026)
